name: tomzang_plungin Plugin
description: A security plugin that validates user input through a firewall API to detect and block sensitive content.

firewallUrl.description: Firewall API URL for content validation (required)

authKey.description: Authentication key for the firewall API (required)

blockMessage.description: Custom block message displayed when input is intercepted (default: 当前请求包含敏感关键字，已被安全组件拦截)

debug.description: Enable debug mode for detailed logging (default: false)
